title.title: Title
title.description: name by which the cited resource is known

title_translated.title: Title (German)
title_translated.description: German name by which the cited resource is known

abstract.title: Abstract
abstract.description: brief narrative summary of the content of the resource(s)

abstract_translated.title: Abstract (German)
abstract_translated.description: Brief German narrative summary of the content of the resource(s)

method_description.title: Method Description
method_description.description: The methodology employed for the study or research

series_information.title: Series Information
series_information.description: Information about a repeating series, such as volume, issue, number

table_of_content.title: Table of Content
table_of_content.description: A listing of the Table of Contents

technical_info.title: Technical Info
technical_info.description: Detailed information that may be associated with design, implementation, operation, use, and/or maintenance of a process or system

other_description.title: Other Description
other_description.description: Other description information that does not fit into an existing category

fundings.title: Funders
fundings.description: Organisations and awards funding this resource.

date_available.title: Date Available
date_available.description: The date the resource is made publicly available. To indicate the end of an embargo period.

date_created.title: Date Created
date_created.description: The date the resource itself was put together.

date_updated.title: Date Updated
date_updated.description: The date of the last update (last revision) to the dataset.

date_accepted.title: Date Accepted
date_accepted.description: The date that the publisher accepted the resource into their system.

date_copyrighted.title: Date Copyrighted
date_copyrighted.description: The specific date at which the dataset receives a copyrighted status.

date_submitted.title: Date Submitted
date_submitted.description: The date the creator submits the resource to the publisher.

date_valid.title: Date Valid
date_valid.description: The date or date range during which the dataset or resource is accurate.

category.title: Category
category.description: high-level geographic data thematic classification to assist in the grouping and search of available geographic data sets.

data_quality_statement.title: data quality statement
data_quality_statement.description: general explanation of the data producer's knowledge about the lineage of a dataset

supplemental_information.title: supplemental information
supplemental_information.description: any other descriptive information about the dataset

attribution.title: Attribution
attribution.description: authority or function assigned, as to a ruler, legislative assembly, delegate, or the like.

data_lineage.title: Data Lineage
data_lineage.description: Description of the lineage of the dataset, including its origin and history

metadata_lineage.title: Metadata Lineage
metadata_lineage.description: Description of the lineage of the metadata, including its origin and history

conformity_results.title: Conformity Result
conformity_results.description: Degree of conformity of the dataset to the implementing rules of the BonaRes Schema.

conformity_explanation.title: Conformity Explanation
conformity_explanation.description: Explanation about the conformity check. (e.g. See the referenced specification.)

temporal_extent_start.title: temporal extent start
temporal_extent_start.description: time period covered by the content of the dataset (start)

temporal_extent_end.title: temporal extent end
temporal_extent_end.description: time period covered by the content of the dataset (end)

maintenance_frequency.title: maintenance frequency
maintenance_frequency.description: frequency with which modifications and deletions are made to the data after it is first produced

purpose.title: purpose
purpose.description: summary of the intentions with which the resource(s) was developed

spatial_representation_type.title: spatial representation type
spatial_representation_type.description: method used to represent geographic information in the dataset.

use_constraint_restrictions.title: Use Constraint Restrictions
use_constraint_restrictions.description: Limitation(s) placed upon the access or use of the data by Admin.

use_constrains.title: Use Constraints (text)
use_constrains.description: Free-text use constraints set by Admin.

restriction_other.title: Other Restrictions
restriction_other.description: Limitation(s) placed upon the access or use of the data by User.

constraints_other.title: Other constraints
constraints_other.description: other restrictions and legal prerequisites for accessing and using the resource or metadata
